rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks inside component type or implementation annexes as appropriate
Use 'assume' for input assumptions and 'guarantee' for output guarantees
Place 'assign' statements only in implementation annexes when the left-hand side is an existing output feature or auxiliary variable
Use concrete bounds, named constants, or visible relations for input assumptions and output guarantees
Relate outputs to inputs in guarantees, avoiding implementation-only subcomponent paths in type annexes
generic_rules: Treat each annex block as scoped to its owning component
Use exact current-case names from the model index for identifiers
Avoid encoding AADL properties as AGREE expressions unless explicitly exposed as ports or constants
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantees in implementation annexes
Avoid using implementation-only subcomponent paths in type annexes
Do not invent ports or components; use only visible identifiers from the model
